tagline: Experience a healthier and safer home with pure, fresh water at every tap

hero.headline: Pure Water, Crystal Pools Since 1999
hero.subheadline: Cape Coral's trusted family-owned water treatment and pool service experts. Over 25 years of keeping Southwest Florida homes healthy with pure water and sparkling pools.

services.headline: Complete Water & Pool Solutions
services.subtitle: From whole-home water purification to weekly pool care, we handle everything so you can enjoy clean, safe water without the worry.

items.title: Weekly Pool Maintenance
items.description: Comprehensive weekly pool cleaning and chemical balancing to keep your pool crystal clear and swim-ready year-round in the Florida heat.

items.title: Pool Equipment Repair
items.description: Expert repair and installation of pumps, filters, heaters, automation systems, and saltwater chlorination conversions.

items.title: Whole-Home Reverse Osmosis
items.description: Complete whole-house RO water purification systems delivering pure, fresh water to every faucet, shower, and appliance in your home.

items.title: Well Pump Services
items.description: Professional well pump installation, repair, pressure tank replacement, and water pressure optimization for reliable well water.

items.title: Water Softener Systems
items.description: Eliminate hard water buildup and protect your plumbing with professional water softener installation, maintenance, and salt refilling.

items.title: Water Filtration & Treatment
items.description: Comprehensive treatment including carbon filtration, aerator installation, air injection systems, and ScaleNet treatment for healthier water.

steps.title: Free Water Test
steps.description: We test your water quality at no cost and identify exactly what treatment your home needs for pure, safe water.

steps.title: Custom Solution Plan
steps.description: Our experts design a tailored water treatment or pool service plan with transparent pricing and no surprise costs.

steps.title: Professional Installation
steps.description: Our certified technicians install your system with a comprehensive warranty and ongoing maintenance support.

about.label: Family-Owned Since 1999
about.headline: Cape Coral's Most Trusted Water Experts
about.description: Water Medic of Cape Coral is a family-owned, locally-operated company that has proudly served Southwest Florida for over 25 years. What started as a small water treatment business has grown into a team of 20 dedicated professionals who treat every customer's home like their own. We've built our reputation on honest pricing, exceptional workmanship, and relationships that span decades.

features.title: Same-Day & Emergency Service
features.description: When your pool equipment fails or water system breaks down, our team responds the same day to get everything running again.

features.title: Comprehensive Warranty
features.description: Every installation comes with a full warranty backed by our 25-year reputation. We stand behind our work, period.

features.title: Decades-Long Relationships
features.description: Many of our customers have been with us 20+ years. We earn your trust every visit with honest service and fair pricing.

pricing.headline: Honest, Transparent Pricing
pricing.subtitle: No hidden fees, no unnecessary upselling. We quote fair prices and stand behind every dollar you invest in your home's water quality.

guarantee.headline: Our Promise to Your Family
guarantee.description: We stand behind every installation with a comprehensive warranty and our 25-year reputation. If you're not completely satisfied with your water quality or pool service, we'll make it right at no additional cost. That's the Water Medic difference - honest service from a family that cares.

faqs.question: How often should my pool be serviced in Cape Coral's climate?
faqs.answer: In Southwest Florida's year-round warm climate, we recommend weekly pool maintenance to maintain proper chemical balance, prevent algae growth, and keep your pool safe and sparkling. Our weekly service includes skimming, vacuuming, chemical testing, and equipment checks.

faqs.question: What's the benefit of a whole-home reverse osmosis system?
faqs.answer: A whole-home RO system removes contaminants, chlorine, and minerals from all your water - not just drinking water. This means cleaner showers, longer-lasting appliances, softer laundry, and pure water at every tap. Most Cape Coral homes see significant improvement in water taste and quality.

faqs.question: Do you offer free water testing?
faqs.answer: Yes! We provide complimentary water quality testing for all customers. Our technicians will test your water on-site and explain the results, then recommend solutions tailored to your specific water conditions with transparent pricing.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to pool or water emergencies?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency service for urgent situations like pool equipment failures, water leaks, or well pump breakdowns. Call us and our team will prioritize getting your water systems back up and running quickly.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve in Southwest Florida?
faqs.answer: We serve Cape Coral, Fort Myers, North Fort Myers, Lehigh Acres, Estero, Bonita Springs, and the surrounding Southwest Florida communities. Our team of 20 technicians covers the entire region with reliable, on-time service.

testimonials.name: Thomas Botwinski
testimonials.text: We have used Water Medic for 26 years now. Would never consider any other service. 5 stars for 26 years.

testimonials.name: Jerry Smith
testimonials.text: Tyler S. from Water Medic was a gem. One of the few service companies that meets or exceeds expectations. First class!

testimonials.name: Donald Quattrocchi
testimonials.text: Brian came in repaired the valve cleaned the system and we haven't had any issues since. Thank you for being an honest company.

contact.headline: Ready for Pure, Clean Water?
contact.subtitle: Schedule your free water quality test today and discover how we can improve your home's water. Same-day appointments available.
benefits: Honest pricing with no hidden fees
